data.title: DigitalOcean Announces Pricing of Upsized Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Today, DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN), a leading Agentic Inference Cloud provider for production AI, disclosed the pricing details of an increased underwritten offering. The offering consists of 10,389,611 shares of its common stock, generating around $800 million in total gross proceeds. Additionally, DigitalOcean has provided the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 1,558,441 more shares of common stock at the public offering price, minus underwriting discounts.

data.title: CorePlus and Ibex Expand Partnership with Clinical Deployment of AI-Powered Diagnostics for TURP
data.description: In Carolina, Puerto Rico, CorePlus Servicios Clínicos y Patológicos, LLC (CorePlus) and Ibex Medical Analytics introduced the first clinical application of Ibex Prostate for Transurethral Resection of the Prostate (TURP). CorePlus, a CLIA-certified laboratory specializing in high-complexity services and digital transformation, teamed up with Ibex, a renowned AI-based cancer diagnostics innovator. This deployment marks a milestone in offering swift diagnostic aid to handle high volumes. Ibex Prostate has been implemented for efficient diagnostic support in this partnership.

data.title: UiPath Announces New Agentic Solution to Accelerate Procurement Cycles
data.description: UiPath has recently unveiled the UiPath Solution for Purchase-to-Pay (P2P), an innovative AI solution aimed at assisting finance teams by integrating agents into their processes.

data.title: UiPath Optimizes Retail and Manufacturing Operations with New Agentic Solutions
data.description: UiPath, a technology company based in New York, has recently introduced revolutionary AI solutions designed to assist retailers and manufacturers in streamlining and automating intricate workflows. This innovative technology aims to enhance efficiency in various processes within these industries.

data.title: Mainelove CEO Jen Millard Named Mainebiz Business Leader of the Year
data.description: In Portland, Maine on March 25, 2026, mainelove, a local canned water company focused on sustainability and community involvement, revealed that their CEO and co-founder, Jen Millard, has been honored as Mainebiz's Business Leader of the Year. This recognition highlights her significant contributions to the state of Maine.

data.title: Triple-A Integrates with Circle Payments Network to Support Cross-Border Stablecoin Settlement
data.description: Singapore, March 25, 2026 - Triple-A, a licensed financial institution operating globally, has confirmed its integration with Circle Payments Network (CPN), managed by Circle Technology Services, LLC, an affiliate of Circle Internet Group, Inc. This announcement comes as Circle Internet Group, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CRCL. The collaboration between Triple-A and CPN signifies a significant partnership within the financial sector.

data.title: Handwave: half of consumers would pay with their palm if privacy is guaranteed, survey finds
data.description: A growing dissatisfaction with existing payment methods and opposition towards stores that only accept cards is pushing for the adoption of more adaptable, touchless alternatives. The younger demographic is spearheading this shift, with 46% of individuals aged 25-34 already embracing palm payments. Despite this trend, the primary apprehension among consumers continues to be the potential misuse of their data.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Amenism, Inc./
data.description: Amenism, Inc. has recently unveiled a groundbreaking concept called Vicarious Authorship, which offers a fresh approach to human-AI collaboration. This news was released on 24-Mar-2026 by the company through PR Newswire. Amid this update, the headline has been revised. The individual involved in this announcement is Tarik Karenga.

data.title: Theo Ai Expands Council Leadership with Prominent Legal Figures, Launches First-Ever Mass Tort Defense Advisory Board
data.description: Prominent attorneys and corporate leaders from renowned organizations such as GEICO, Glaser Weil, and Wheeler Trigg O'Donnell LLP have been appointed to enhance the legal AI sector, signaling increasing industry trust. The AI-driven prediction platform, Theo Ai, is at the forefront of this development. This news comes from San Francisco and was announced on March 25, 2026. The prestigious appointments reflect the accelerating confidence in legal AI, indicating a significant shift in the industry landscape.

data.title: Fitness Tech Startup Reclaim Lifestyles Re-Launches Restart! App on Apple App Store and Google Play to Empower Less Active Adults 50+
data.description: An Atlanta wellness software company called Reclaim Lifestyles, established by friends Jeff White and Tom Pecht, has introduced a newly redesigned digital wellness app. This app offers customized workout programs specifically designed for older adults. It aims to provide low-barrier exercises to cater to the needs of aging individuals. The updated app was released on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Climative Launches Insurance Data Platform that Helps Insurers Turn Climate Risk Insight into Homeowner Action
data.description: A property-level climate intelligence firm called Climative has launched a new platform in Boston on March 25, 2026. This platform aims to assist insurers in enhancing their portfolios by providing homeowners with tailored plans to boost resilience, energy efficiency, and affordability. The platform helps go beyond conventional risk scores, focusing on offering clear and personalized strategies. This innovative approach could potentially transform the insurance industry, with Climative paving the way for a more proactive and consumer-centric model.

data.title: Two Major Vintage Computer Museums Join VintageComputerRental.com Affiliate Network, Expanding Access to Rare and Historic Technology for Media Productions
data.description: Forest Grove, Pennsylvania - On March 25, 2026, VintageComputerRental.com, a company specializing in renting authentic vintage technology and providing historical accuracy consulting for various media productions, has revealed a new collaboration with two prominent vintage computer museums. These museums will contribute their collections to VintageComputerRental.com's services, bringing a wide range of historic computers for rental purposes. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the company's efforts to provide access to rare technology for film, TV, streaming, and media projects.

data.title: Elizabeth Waterman Debuts Propulsion at this Year's Photo London with Albumen Gallery
data.description: A new photographic series titled Propulsion by Elizabeth Waterman will be showcased at Photo London this year. The exhibition will take place at National Hall, Olympia in London from May 14th to 17th. The series explores themes of eroticism, movement, and marine kinship. Shot on analog film, this collection offers a unique perspective to viewers. Visit booth B10 to experience these captivating images firsthand.

data.title: New Kiddie Academy® of Humble dedicated to growing future leaders in Harris County
data.description: A recently opened franchise location of the renowned Kiddie Academy® Educational Child Care in Humble, Houston is offering hands-on STEM education. The family-owned Academy, launched on March 25, 2026, aims to provide young children with an innovative approach to learning. With a focus on Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics, this facility is equipped to nurture young minds. This initiative showcases the commitment to quality education, as the academy aims to foster a passion for STEM subjects from an early age.

data.title: Enzon Announces Completion of the Exchange Offer Relating to Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock
data.description: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Cranford, N.J., made an announcement on March 25, 2026. The company, traded on OTCQB under the symbol ENZN, disclosed the completion of its exchange offer for its Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock valued at $0.01 per share. The offer allowed holders of the Series C Preferred Stock to exchange it for Enzon's Common Stock valued at $0.01 per share. The deadline for the offer and withdrawal rights was on March 24, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. This exchange offer was detailed in the Prospectus/Consent Solicitation/Offer to Exchange document, which was filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on January 28, 2026, and approved on January 30, 2026.

data.title: Roadzen's drivebuddyAI Secures Driver Identification Patent, Establishing the IP Foundation for Fleet Safety Intelligence
data.description: Having secured over 15 patents worldwide and being the sole recipient of AIS-184, EU GSR 2144, and Euro NCAP 2026 certifications, drivebuddyAI is solidifying its role as the premier intelligence layer for mobility.
